    class JsonParseError extends Data.TaggedError("JsonParseError")<{ cause: unknown }> {}
    
    export const shouldReport = Effect.try({
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~

      try: () => JSON.parse("{"),
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~

    })
